ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the employee (M or F) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the employee */,
  "height_in" INTEGER /* Height of the employee in inches */,
  "weight_lbs" INTEGER /* Weight of the employee in pounds */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the employee belongs to */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the employee is located */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the employee */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Salary of the employee */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of employment contract (e.g., full-time, part-time, contract) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager in charge of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Annual budget allocated to the department */,
  "number_of_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the department */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the department was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_head" TEXT /* Name of the regional head */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the region */,
  "number_of_departments" INTEGER /* Number of departments in the region */,
  "number_of_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the region */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the region was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health metric record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the health metric was recorded */,
  "height_in" INTEGER /* Height of the employee in inches */,
  "weight_lbs" INTEGER /* Weight of the employee in pounds */,
  "blood_pressure" TEXT /* Blood pressure of the employee */,
  "cholesterol" INTEGER /* Cholesterol level of the employee */,
  "smoker" INTEGER /* Whether the employee is a smoker */,
  "family_history" INTEGER /* Whether the employee has a family history of health issues */,
  "blood_type" TEXT /* Blood type of the employee */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Any known allergies of the employee */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Any medical conditions of the employee */,
  "last_medical_checkup" TEXT /* Date of the last medical checkup */,
  "vaccination_status" TEXT /* Vaccination status of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance evaluation */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the performance evaluation was conducted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the employee (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the evaluator */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluator */,
  "goal_achieved" INTEGER /* Whether the employee achieved their goals */,
  "improvement_areas" TEXT /* Areas where the employee needs improvement */,
  "next_evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the next performance evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_evaluations_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_evaluations_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the training program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Description of the training program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the training program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the training program */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the training program */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost of the training program */,
  "max_participants" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed in the program */,
  "enrolled_participants" INTEGER /* Number of participants currently enrolled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_programs_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_training" (
  "participation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training participation record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training program */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the employee enrolled in the program */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the employee completed the program */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the participation (e.g., enrolled, completed, dropped) */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade or score received in the training program */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the instructor or participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_training_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES training_programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_training_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "career_development" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each career development goal */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "goal_description" TEXT /* Description of the career development goal */,
  "target_date" TEXT /* Target date for achieving the goal */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the goal (e.g., in progress, completed, not started) */,
  "mentor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mentor */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the career development goal (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "resources" TEXT /* Resources available to achieve the goal (e.g., training programs, mentorship) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_career_development_mentor_id FOREIGN KEY ("mentor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_career_development_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., HR, manager, employee) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the user is located */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee whose record was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
